page_metadata.biotools__summary: A tool to perform maker-set association analysis. Association analysis at gene, pathway, or exon levels (here by marker-set analysis) hold great promise in evaluating modest etiological effects of genes with GWAS or sequence data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A tool to perform maker-set association analysis. Association analysis at gene, pathway, or exon levels (here by marker-set analysis) hold great promise in evaluating modest etiological effects of genes with GWAS or sequence data.
